procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1489

sigma.title: Azure Container Registry Created or Deleted
Azure Kubernetes Cluster Created or Deleted
Azure Kubernetes RoleBinding/ClusterRoleBinding Modified and Deleted
Azure Kubernetes Secret or Config Object Access
Azure Kubernetes Service Account Modified or Deleted

osquery.name: t1489_proc_impact
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, uid FROM processes WHERE cmdline LIKE '%rm -rf%' OR cmdline LIKE '%mkfs%' OR cmdline LIKE '%dd if=%' OR cmdline LIKE '%shred%' OR cmdline LIKE '%wipe%' LIMIT 100;

osquery.name: t1489_disk_events
osquery.query_text: SELECT target_path, action, uid, time FROM file_events WHERE action = 'DELETE' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100;

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 7 direct run(s), 8/8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
promotion.multi_source_upgrade_note: Upgraded from S5-P to S5-C-Docker-H based on real detections from: deception_engine_real_engagement. See sigma_matches.json for corroborating detection records.
promotion.sigma_direct_note: Real Sigma firing confirmed in sigma_evaluation_report.json (Linux osquery or Windows Sysmon GHA telemetry). Cert tier upgraded to direct (-D).

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
